query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `otelmsDailyReports` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `reportDate` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `checkIns` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `checkOuts` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `cancellations` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalRevenue` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `adr` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `occupancyRate` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `revPAR` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalGuests` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalChildren` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `roomsOccupied` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `carsParked` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `channelData` JSON,
  `emailId` VARCHAR(255),
  `rawContent` TEXT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_reportDate` (`reportDate`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:

  `channelData` JSON,
  `emailId` VARCHAR(255),
  `rawContent` TEXT,

  `updatedAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_reportDate` (`reportDate`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
